title: Protected tie down strap
abstract: A protected tie down strap encapsulates an adjustable tie down strap within a strap housing and includes a fixed tie down strap. An adjustment knob allows a user to turn the knob and take up slack in the adjustable tie down strap. The protected tie down strap utilizes a number of internal components including force plates, a power disc, washers, screw, shaft, etc. Together, they complete the complex task of tightening the tie down strap by powerfully wrapping it around the shaft in response to a user turning the adjustment knob. When the user wishes to release the tension on the tie down strap, he or she simply turns the adjustment knob the other direction (in other embodiments, he or she raises the adjustment knob up to release the strap and untie the load.)
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A protected tie down strap which utilizes an interior mechanical tensioning spool to tighten and loosen an adjustable tie down strap, the protected tie down strap comprising: a housing protecting therein the mechanical tensioning spool, the mechanical tensioning spook comprising a shaft; the mechanical tensioning spool further comprises a plurality of force plates and a power disc which engage and disengage in order to tighten and loosen an adjustable tie down strap in response to a user turning an adjustment knob a first direction which rotates a first force plate; rotation of the first force plate advances the power disc and causes the shaft to rotate and wind up more of the adjustable tie down strap, thereby tightening the adjustable tie down strap; when the user turns the adjustment knob a second direction, tension is released on the spool and the adjustable tie down strap is loosened; and the protected tie down strap further comprises a fixed tie down strap.
